text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all the support last year. I'm
looking forward to working with you this year too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...There. Got the formal greeting out of the way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"Young lady"? What are you, one of my
grandparents?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I grew up surrounded by adults, so they were
always lecturing me about my manners and
greetings.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You've been my trainer for a while too, so I just
wanted to do things right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, and about my New Year's resolution...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No, actually, why don't you share yours first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The New Year's resolution I set for us is...
choice_data_list:
Let's take extra care when coming up with a
training routine!
Let's focus on health with a better diet!
Let's learn some new tricks to stand out!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oho... You wanna make sure every part of our
training has a purpose, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Really considering the effects and stuff, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Nice Nature already has a grasp of
how training affects her progress. She is a smart
girl, after all. In that case...
choice_data_list: I think you can go even deeper than that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's a very peculiar way of saying "think
harder." But yeah, I'll do as you say.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And trust me, my mind will go as deep as it needs
to go. I'll figure out your game in no time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discussing my New Year's resolution, I have
another thing I have to talk to her about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A better diet?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I already pay attention to my diet, though. I'm a
young athlete, after all.
choice_data_list:
Are you paying attention to your snacking in
the shopping district too?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urk! H-how did you know about that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the shop owners are so nice and give me
food! There's no way I can reject that kindness.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So please, Trainer! Is there any way you could
ignore the snacking part?
choice_data_list:
If you make your dinner proportionally smaller,
sure.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uuuuugh, noooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discussing my New Year's resolution, I have
another thing I have to talk to her about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aw, geez, here we go... New tricks? Stand out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm no good at any of that. That stuff's only for
naturally talented people.
choice_data_list:
But don't you want a secret weapon unique to
you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I guess, but I can't help cringing at those
phrases.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A secret weapon, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've got a year. I'll keep an eye out for
things that could potentially work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discussing my New Year's resolution, I have
another thing I have to talk to her about.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ummm... Trainer? What did you just say?
choice_data_list:
Tokai Teio is going to be competing in the
Wakagoma Stakes!

Tokai Teio is going to be competing in the
Wakagoma Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio is the strongest of her generation.
Though earlier than expected, Nice Nature will
face off against her in an open race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Geez... I was hoping I just misheard...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm joining that race to show everyone what I can
do... Ugh, why did Teio have to join?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're my trainer! Of course, you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urghhh, I guess I really have to do this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see she's still wrestling with her feelings but
has accepted the reality of the situation. As long
as we keep training, I'm sure we can win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You want me to tell you now?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Umm... Uh... Soooo, my resolution is...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Top.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urgh! To slide on up to the top!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea! I wasn't the one who
came up with this resolution!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I went to the shopping district the other day to
say hi to people, and I happened to mention that
I didn't have a New Year's resolution yet.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone teased me into making an epic
resolution!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So it's like... I set that as mine just to go along
with it.
choice_data_list: Well, let's slide into victory next race!
Well, let's slide into victory next race!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I can't! It's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I knew I shouldn't have said anything!
